desc: Elder Graystripe leaves a troubled ThunderClan to journey back to the old forest and the Moonstone, confronting his past and a new group called WarriorClan.
descZh: 长老灰条离开陷入动荡的雷族，回到旧森林与月亮石，直面过往，并邂逅了一个自称「武士族」的群体。

q.en: Which Clan is Graystripe a loyal member of?
q.zh: 灰条（Graystripe）是哪个族忠心耿耿的成员？

options.en: ShadowClan according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 影族（ShadowClan）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Graystripe is a longtime ThunderClan warrior and one of Firestar's most trusted friends.
explain.zh: 灰条是雷族的老牌武士，也是火星最信任的朋友之一。

q.en: Who was Graystripe's best friend and the leader he served as deputy under?
q.zh: 谁是灰条最好的朋友，也是他担任副族长时辅佐的族长？

explain.en: Graystripe and Firestar trained as apprentices together and remained inseparable their whole lives.
explain.zh: 灰条与火星一同作为学徒受训，此后一生形影不离。

q.en: The 'Now' part of the book is set during which arc, when StarClan has gone silent?
q.zh: 本书的「现在（Now）」部分发生在哪一段剧情中，当时星族已陷入沉默？

options.zh: A Vision of Shadows（《群星预言》）

explain.en: Graystripe's journey in the present is set during The Broken Code, a time when StarClan no longer speaks.
explain.zh: 灰条在「现在」的旅程发生在《破戒》期间，那时星族已不再发声。

q.en: What happened to Graystripe's mate Millie before this book?
q.zh: 在本书之前，灰条的伴侣米莉（Millie）遭遇了什么？

explain.en: Graystripe is mourning Millie, his longtime mate, who passed away before the story begins.
explain.zh: 灰条正在为伴侣米莉哀悼——在故事开始前，这位相伴多年的伴侣已经离世。

q.en: On his journey, Graystripe visits his son Stormfur, who lives with which group?
q.zh: 旅途中，灰条去探望儿子暴毛（Stormfur），暴毛和哪群猫生活在一起？

options.en: RiverClan according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 河族（RiverClan）（按书中另一种说法）
激流部落（Tribe of Rushing Water）

explain.en: Stormfur, Graystripe's son with Silverstream, made his home among the Tribe of Rushing Water.
explain.zh: 暴毛是灰条与银溪（Silverstream）的儿子，在激流部落安了家。

q.en: In the old forest, Graystripe meets a group of kittypets pretending to be a Clan. What do they call themselves?
q.zh: 在旧森林里，灰条遇到一群假装成猫族的宠物猫。他们自称什么？

options.en: The Sisters according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 姐妹会（the Sisters）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A band of kittypets, inspired by old stories, formed their own make-believe Clan called WarriorClan.
explain.zh: 一群受古老传说启发、自娱自乐的宠物猫，组建了一个假想的「武士族」。

q.en: Who leads this group of kittypet 'warriors'?
q.zh: 这群宠物猫「武士」的首领是谁？

options.en: Graystripe according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 灰条（Graystripe）（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The kittypets chose a leader they named Monkeystar to head their pretend WarriorClan.
explain.zh: 这些宠物猫选了一只叫「猴星」（Monkeystar）的猫来统领他们假想的武士族。

q.en: When Graystripe reaches the Moonstone at Highstones, what happens to it?
q.zh: 当灰条抵达高石（Highstones）的月亮石时，它发生了什么？

options.en: It glows brightly according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它发出明亮的光（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A bolt of lightning strikes the Moonstone and breaks it apart, leaving Graystripe without a sign.
explain.zh: 一道闪电击中月亮石，把它击得粉碎，灰条没能等到任何征兆。

q.en: In the 'Then' flashbacks, Graystripe acts as ThunderClan's temporary leader while Firestar is away doing what?
q.zh: 在「那时（Then）」的回忆里，火星离家去完成什么任务时，灰条暂代雷族族长？

options.en: Training apprentices according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 训练学徒（按书中另一种说法）
重建天族（Firestar's Quest《火星的任务》）

explain.en: While Firestar and Sandstorm are away rebuilding SkyClan, Graystripe holds ThunderClan together as acting leader.
explain.zh: 当火星和沙暴（Sandstorm）离家去重建天族时，灰条以代族长的身份撑起了雷族。

q.en: By the end of his journey, what does Graystripe decide about where he belongs?
q.zh: 到旅程结束时，灰条对自己属于何处做出了什么决定？

options.en: ThunderClan is his home and where he belongs
options.zh: 雷族是他的家，也是他归属的地方

options.en: He will stay with WarriorClan according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他会留在武士族（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He will live with the Tribe

explain.en: Though the Clan has changed, Graystripe returns to ThunderClan, certain that it is where he belongs.
explain.zh: 尽管雷族已不同往日，灰条仍回到雷族，因为他确信那里才是自己的归宿。
